transcend.book.title: Transcend Arcane Encyclopedia
transcend.book.landing: $(o)"Magic is not a formula. It is tinnitus."$()$(br2)An ancient tome containing all knowledge of magic circles. Turn its pages to unveil the mysteries of arcane formations.$(br2)$(l)Hotkeys$()$(br)· $(l)K$() — Open the Ascension Book$(br)· $(l)J$() — Open the Vow Screen$(br2)$(l)Recommended Reading$()$(br)· Origin of Transcendence / Origin of Mana$(br)· Circle Codex / Effect Codex$(br)· Schools of Magic / Vow System
transcend.category.circles.desc: A catalog of all known magic circle types, covering their visual traits, elemental affinities, and combat effects.
transcend.category.system.desc: A guide to Magic Crystals, Enhancement Materials, and Mana Storage.
transcend.entry.arcane.name: Arcane Formation
transcend.entry.arcane.p1: Inscribed with the lost patterns of primordial power. Deploys a cyan hexagram with golden runes orbiting the outer ring.
transcend.entry.arcane.p2: Effect: Binds all hostile mobs in range, disabling AI and movement. Deals minor magic damage per second with lightning particle effects on bound targets.$(br2)Special Enhancement: $(l)Bind Strength$() 鈥?Increases damage dealt during binding.
transcend.entry.eldritch.name: Eldritch Formation
transcend.entry.eldritch.p1: Woven from threads of the void between stars. A violet hexagram with fast-spinning runes and spiral overlays.
transcend.entry.eldritch.p2: Effect: Similar to Arcane 鈥?binds and damages hostiles. Features more vivid color blending and faster rune rotation.$(br2)Special Enhancement: $(l)Bind Strength$() 鈥?Increases damage dealt during binding.
transcend.entry.inferno.name: Inferno Formation
transcend.entry.inferno.p1: Forged in the heart of a dying star. A red-orange pentagram with soul fire, smoke, and a heat-shimmer outer ring.
transcend.entry.inferno.p2: Effect: Deals 2.0 fire damage per second and continuously ignites enemies. Flame and smoke particles create an intense battlefield.$(br2)Special Enhancement: $(l)Burn Duration$() 鈥?Extends ignition time from 3s up to 8s.
transcend.entry.glacial.name: Glacial Formation
transcend.entry.glacial.p1: Crystallized from the breath of eternal winter. An ice-blue hexagonal snowflake pattern with frost particles drifting down from above.
transcend.entry.glacial.p2: Effect: Gradually freezes enemies (powder snow mechanic), applies Slowness II/III, and deals 1.5 magic damage per second.$(br2)Special Enhancement: $(l)Freeze Depth$() 鈥?Increases freeze rate and maximum freeze level.
transcend.entry.sanctum.name: Sanctum Formation
transcend.entry.sanctum.p1: Blessed by the light that mends all wounds. A green cross pattern with golden runes and rising heal particles, accompanied by amethyst chimes.
transcend.entry.sanctum.p2: Effect: Players only. Heals 1.0 HP per second and grants Regeneration I. Enchant and end rod particles shimmer at cross tips.$(br2)Special Enhancement: $(l)Heal Range$() 鈥?Expands the healing radius.
transcend.entry.gravity.name: Gravity Formation
transcend.entry.gravity.p1: Woven from the fabric of collapsed dimensions. Three dark-purple spiral arms pull everything inward, with portal particles and smoke being devoured by the core.
transcend.entry.gravity.p2: Effect: Applies inward gravitational pull (AI remains active 鈥?enemies struggle). Deals minor magic damage. Dark cascade particles fall from above.$(br2)Special Enhancement: $(l)Pull Force$() 鈥?Increases gravitational coefficient.
transcend.entry.thunder.name: Thunder Formation
transcend.entry.thunder.p1: Charged with the fury of ten thousand storms. An electric-blue octagram with yellow outer ring, crackling arcs leaping between vertices.
transcend.entry.thunder.p2: Effect: Deals 3.0 lightning damage every 0.75s. Lightning $(l)chains$() between enemies within 4 blocks for 1.5 bonus damage. Periodically spawns visual lightning bolts.$(br2)Special Enhancement: $(l)Chain Range$() 鈥?Extends chain distance up to 10 blocks.
transcend.entry.tempest.name: Tempest Formation
transcend.entry.tempest.p1: Born of the winds that tear the sky asunder. Multi-layered ascending vortex rings rotating at different heights, with white streaks and debris swirling upward.
transcend.entry.tempest.p2: Effect: Continuously $(l)launches enemies upward$() and pushes them outward. Deals 1.0 magic damage per second. Launched enemies take fall damage when the circle ends.$(br2)Special Enhancement: $(l)Wind Force$() 鈥?Increases upward launch strength.
transcend.entry.terra.name: Terra Formation
transcend.entry.terra.p1: Carved from the bones of the ancient earth. A brown-green nested square mandala with earthy runes and a deep anvil-landing rumble.
transcend.entry.terra.p2: Effect: Pure support circle. Grants $(l)players$() Resistance I; applies Slowness II and Mining Fatigue I to $(l)enemies$(). No direct damage.$(br2)Special Enhancement: $(l)Armor Level$() 鈥?Increases Resistance effect level up to III.
transcend.entry.void.name: Void Formation
transcend.entry.void.p1: Drawn from the abyss where no light returns. A near-black inverted pentagram with dark tendrils pulling inward, end rod particles being consumed, and wither mist.
transcend.entry.void.p2: Effect: Highest DPS circle. Applies Wither II, deals 2.0 magic damage per second, plus periodic 1.0 Transcend-type damage.$(br2)Special Enhancement: $(l)Wither Level$() 鈥?Increases Wither effect level up to V.
transcend.entry.celestial.name: Celestial Formation
transcend.entry.celestial.p1: Condensed from forgotten ticks of the river of time. A golden clock-dial whose hands sync to current game time, with sun and moon arcs shifting brightness with the day-night cycle.
transcend.entry.celestial.p2: Effect: Smoothly advances game time each tick, accelerating the day-night cycle. Applies Slowness II and Weakness II to enemies, dealing 1.5 magic damage per second.$(br2)Special Enhancement: $(l)Time Accel$() 鈥?Increases time advancement per tick.
transcend.entry.blood.name: Blood Formation
transcend.entry.blood.p1: Inked in blood, penned in agony. A crimson inverted pentagram with red particles dripping downward and witch particles spreading corruption.
transcend.entry.blood.p2: Effect: Deals 2.5 magic damage every 0.75s and applies Hunger. Core mechanic is $(l)Lifesteal$() 鈥?25% of damage heals the nearest player.$(br2)Special Enhancement: $(l)Lifesteal$() 鈥?Increases steal ratio up to 65%.
transcend.entry.divine.name: Divine Formation
transcend.entry.divine.p1: Bearing the blessings and mercy of the heavens. A brilliant golden double-cross (8 arms) with triple concentric rings and dense enchant particles ascending endlessly.
transcend.entry.divine.p2: Effect: Heals $(l)all living entities$() (including enemies). Restores 1.5 HP/s, grants players Regeneration II and Resistance I. All entities gain Glowing.$(br2)Special Enhancement: $(l)Grace Range$() 鈥?Expands healing and glow radius.
transcend.entry.chaos.name: Chaos Formation
transcend.entry.chaos.p1: Born in the crevice between order and oblivion. A color-shifting heptagram with variable spiral arms, cycling vanilla particles, and an ever-morphing inner polygon.
transcend.entry.chaos.p2: Effect: Each trigger applies a random effect to each mob 鈥?3.0 damage, random teleport, random potion, ignition, freeze, or levitation. Occasionally $(l)buffs$() a random enemy.$(br2)Special Enhancement: $(l)Chaos Freq$() 鈥?Shortens effect trigger interval.
transcend.entry.phantom.name: Phantom Formation
transcend.entry.phantom.p1: Drifting between dream and reality. Translucent ghost rings pulse with sine-wave visibility, smoke and end rod particles drift slowly, accompanied by phantom murmurs.
transcend.entry.phantom.p2: Effect: Applies Blindness and Darkness to enemies, deals 1.0 magic damage every 0.75s. Grants the nearest player $(l)Invisibility$().$(br2)Special Enhancement: $(l)Phantom Density$() 鈥?Increases Blindness effect level.
transcend.entry.skybound.name: Skybound Formation
transcend.entry.skybound.p1: Seals the path to the heavens with chains. A red cross-anchor with dotted outer ring. When entities fly above 2 blocks, a red particle chain connects to them with a rotating arcane sigil on their body.
transcend.entry.skybound.p2: Effect: Tracks all flying entities within 8 blocks. Pulls them down with force scaling by excess height. Displays red hexagram rings, rotating runes, and radial lines on targets. Deals 1.0 magic damage per second.$(br2)Special Enhancement: $(l)Chain Force$() 鈥?Increases pull-down strength.
transcend.entry.enhancement.name: Enhancement System
transcend.entry.enhancement.p1: Every magic circle can be enhanced with four types of essence.$(br2)$(l)How to use:$() Hold essence in main hand, circle in off-hand, right-click. Each attribute maxes at Lv.5.$(br2)Four essences:$(br)$(#f55)Power Essence$() 鈥?Boost damage$(br)$(#5ff)Temporal Essence$() 鈥?Extend duration (up to 500%)$(br)$(#5f5)Efficiency Essence$() 鈥?Reduce cost$(br)$(#f5f)Quintessence$() 鈥?Enhance unique trait
transcend.entry.enhancement.p2: $(l)Power$(): Increases damage/healing output and slightly expands radius.$(br2)$(l)Duration$(): Extends circle lifetime. At Lv.5, duration reaches 500% of base.$(br2)$(l)Efficiency$(): Reduces mana cost per deployment.$(br2)$(l)Special Trait$(): Each circle has a unique enhancement dimension, shown in purple on the tooltip.
transcend.entry.crystals.name: Magic Crystals
transcend.entry.crystals.p1: A crystallized essence of pure mana. Automatically consumed from inventory when deploying circles. Base cost is 1, scaling with enhancement level. Stacks to 64.
transcend.entry.crystals.p2: A high-purity refined crystal worth 3 regular Magic Crystals. Mana Storage is consumed first when deploying; remaining cost draws from loose crystals in inventory.
transcend.entry.mana_storage.name: Mana Storage
transcend.entry.mana_storage.p1: A vessel that stores up to 256 mana. Hold it in one hand and Magic Crystals in the other, then right-click to charge. Refined crystals inject 3 mana each.
transcend.entry.mana_storage.p2: When deploying circles, the system $(l)prioritizes$() draining Mana Storage in your inventory before consuming loose crystals. Displays a blue mana bar on the item, glows when full. Creative mode bypasses mana cost.
transcend.reaction.steam_explosion.desc: Fire + Ice: 1.5x AOE blast of scalding steam
transcend.reaction.firestorm.desc: Fire + Wind: Ignites area for 6 seconds with spreading flames
transcend.reaction.superconduct.desc: Thunder + Ice: Weakness III and extreme Slowness
transcend.reaction.electrify.desc: Thunder + Wind: Chain lightning strikes nearby entities
transcend.reaction.permafrost.desc: Earth + Ice: Total freeze with frost damage and Slowness V
transcend.reaction.annihilate.desc: Void + Holy: 3x damage 鈥?when light meets void, existence itself is torn
transcend.reaction.toxic_flame.desc: Poison + Fire: Burns and poisons in a spreading cloud
transcend.reaction.twilight_burst.desc: Dark + Light: When shadow and radiance collide, a burst of twilight energy blinds and reveals all
transcend.reaction.toxic_bloom.desc: Nature + Poison: Life force twists into a deadly bloom that poisons foes and heals the caster
transcend.reaction.dimensional_rift.desc: Time + Space: The fabric of reality tears open, scattering all entities to random positions
transcend.reaction.wild_surge.desc: Chaos + Any: The primordial Chaos recognizes no rules 鈥?unpredictable and devastating
transcend.reaction.soul_drain.desc: Blood + Dark: Drains the target's life essence, dealing heavy damage and healing the caster
transcend.reaction.shockwave.desc: Sonic + Thunder: A devastating blast of sound and lightning that stuns and scatters all nearby
transcend.entry.reactions.name: Element Reactions
transcend.entry.reactions.p1: When two different elements strike the same target within 5 seconds, the residual elemental marks react violently 鈥?producing effects far greater than either element alone.$(br2)The ancient texts called these $(l)Element Reactions$() 鈥?proof that the Transcendence, though fractured into eighteen threads, still yearns to reunite.$(br2)$(l)Basic Reactions:$()$(br)$(#f55)Steam Explosion$() 鈥?Fire + Ice$(br)$(#fa0)Firestorm$() 鈥?Fire + Wind$(br)$(#5af)Superconduct$() 鈥?Thunder + Ice$(br)$(#ff5)Overload$() 鈥?Thunder + Fire$(br)$(#ff0)Electrify$() 鈥?Thunder + Wind$(br)$(#aef)Permafrost$() 鈥?Earth + Ice$(br)$(#fff)Annihilate$() 鈥?Void + Holy$(br)$(#5a0)Toxic Flame$() 鈥?Poison + Fire
transcend.entry.reactions.p2: $(l)Advanced Reactions:$()$(br2)$(#a5f)Twilight Burst$() 鈥?Dark + Light$(br)When shadow and radiance collide, twilight energy erupts. Blinds and reveals all nearby entities.$(br2)$(#5f5)Toxic Bloom$() 鈥?Nature + Poison$(br)Life force twists into venomous bloom. Poisons the area while healing the caster.$(br2)$(#f5f)Dimensional Rift$() 鈥?Time + Space$(br)Reality itself tears open, teleporting all entities to random positions with massive damage.$(br2)$(#f0f)Wild Surge$() 鈥?Chaos + Any Element$(br)The primordial Chaos defies all patterns. Completely random and devastating effects.$(br2)$(#500)Soul Drain$() 鈥?Blood + Dark$(br)Drains target's life essence. Heavy damage with 50% lifesteal.$(br2)$(#5ff)Shockwave$() 鈥?Sonic + Thunder$(br)Sound and lightning combine into a devastating blast that stuns and scatters.
tooltip.transcend.ancient_glyph.desc: An ancient ward-stone inscribed with elemental patterns. Right-click to awaken the Elemental Warden.
tooltip.transcend.rift_fragment.desc: A shard torn from the boundary between dimensions. Right-click to summon the Void Weaver.
tooltip.transcend.transcendence_core.des: A crystallized fragment of the original Transcendence. Right-click to invoke the Transcendence Avatar.
transcend.entry.bosses.name: Ancient Guardians
transcend.entry.bosses.p1: Not all remnants of the First Age are inert. The ancients left behind more than circles and alloys 鈥?they created $(l)sentient guardians$() to protect their knowledge from the unworthy.$(br2)Three tiers of guardians remain:$(br2)$(#dc3)Elemental Warden$() 鈥?An autonomous construct forged from Transcend Alloy, infused with a single elemental thread. It shifts between Fire, Ice, and Thunder, protecting the scattered workshops of the ancients. Weakened by the element that counters its current state.$(br2)$(#80f)Void Weaver$() 鈥?Once a mortal scholar who sought to reweave the fractured threads. The attempt consumed his body but not his will. He now exists as a tear in reality itself, wielding Void and Space against all who approach. Holy light is his anathema.
transcend.entry.bosses.p2: $(#fff)Transcendence Avatar$() 鈥?The most terrifying of all guardians. Not a construct, not a corrupted mortal, but a $(l)shard of the Transcendence itself$(). When the primordial force fractured, some fragments retained a dim awareness 鈥?a hunger to recollect, to become whole again. The Avatar cycles through all eighteen elements, immune to whichever it currently embodies. In its final desperate state, it can only be harmed by those who master the art of Element Reactions.$(br2)To challenge these beings is to challenge the very foundations of magic. Prepare accordingly.
advancement.transcend.root.desc: Obtain Transcend Alloy 鈥?the only material that can contain the primordial force
advancement.transcend.workbench.desc: Craft a Spell Workbench to begin assembling spells
advancement.transcend.master_wand.desc: Obtain the Master Wand 鈥?7 spell slots, the pinnacle of modern spellcraft
advancement.transcend.kill_warden.desc: Defeat the Elemental Warden 鈥?a construct of the First Age
advancement.transcend.kill_weaver.desc: Defeat the Void Weaver 鈥?a scholar consumed by the space between dimensions
advancement.transcend.kill_avatar.desc: Defeat the Transcendence Avatar 鈥?a shard of the primordial force itself. You have mastered what the ancients could not.
tooltip.transcend.ascension_book.desc: An ancient tome bearing the secrets of ascension. Right-click to open the Ascension Talent Tree.
gui.transcend.mastery_locked: Complete the Purification Ritual (Stage 2) to unlock Mastery selection
mage_class.transcend.none.desc: You have not yet set foot on the path of ascension.
mage_class.transcend.pyromancer.desc: Masters the forces of fire, blood, and chaos. Obliterates enemies in a relentless molten assault.
mage_class.transcend.cryomancer.desc: Commands ice, wind, and the threads of time. Seals all things in absolute zero.
mage_class.transcend.stormcaller.desc: Wields thunder, sonic force, and space. Tears through opposition at the speed of lightning.
mage_class.transcend.arcanist.desc: Channels holy radiance, light, and nature. Protects and purifies in the name of the divine.
mage_class.transcend.abysswalker.desc: Walks the void and shadow. Erodes the foundations of existence with deep abyssal force.
mage_class.transcend.earthshaper.desc: Commands earth, venom, and acid. Corrodes all things with the fury of nature.
mage_class.transcend.omnimancer.desc: A balanced mage proficient in all elements. Minor bonuses to all spell types, excels at multi-element synergy and mana recovery.

scroll.transcend.solar_judgement.desc: After a 4-second channel, calls down a radiant strike in a 14-block radius. Deals heavy holy damage and ignites undead.

manuscript.transcend.world_origin.title: §6§l⟁ Manuscript of Origin ⟁
manuscript.transcend.world_origin.line1: §fIn the beginning, the cosmos was but a swirl of unformed mana.
manuscript.transcend.world_origin.line2: §fFormless, voiceless, only silence and waiting possibilities.
manuscript.transcend.world_origin.line3: §fFrom the swirl, four aspects emerged — Aether, Blood, Cosmic, Tainted.
manuscript.transcend.world_origin.line4: §fThe four warred and danced, dividing the void into earth, sky, sea, stars.
manuscript.transcend.world_origin.line5: §fAll things came from this — but the aspects sleep within still.
manuscript.transcend.world_origin.line6: §fThose who feel them are ascendants. Those who wield them transcend.
manuscript.transcend.world_origin.line7: §7§o— From the opening of the Nameless Scroll —
manuscript.transcend.mana_theory.title: §b§l⟁ Manuscript of Mana ⟁
manuscript.transcend.mana_theory.line1: §fMana is neither matter nor energy — but latent will between them.
manuscript.transcend.mana_theory.line2: §fIt sleeps in crystals, flows between chunks, light as wind yet heavy as stone.
manuscript.transcend.mana_theory.line3: §fThrough aspect crystals it may be purified and drawn.
manuscript.transcend.mana_theory.line4: §fConduits are the only visible paths of mana in this world.
manuscript.transcend.mana_theory.line5: §fFlowing mana must be guided, else dissipates as ambient density.
manuscript.transcend.mana_theory.line6: §fHe who masters flow masters the world's deepest laws.
manuscript.transcend.mana_theory.line7: §7§o— From Treatises of the Aspects, vol. III —
manuscript.transcend.aspect_lore.title: §d§l⟁ Manuscript of Aspects ⟁
manuscript.transcend.aspect_lore.line1: §6Aether §f— the pure radiance of beginnings. Bears life, heals all.
manuscript.transcend.aspect_lore.line2: §cBlood §f— the burning pulse within the living. Mighty, but demands sacrifice.
manuscript.transcend.aspect_lore.line3: §9Cosmic §f— the cold wisdom from the void. Guides exploration and transcendence.
manuscript.transcend.aspect_lore.line4: §5Tainted §f— what remains after all is dissolved. Greedy, stable, eternal.
manuscript.transcend.aspect_lore.line5: §fThe four oppose and birth each other — irreplaceable, each a facet of the world.
manuscript.transcend.aspect_lore.line6: §fHe who gathers all four becomes a complete transcender.
manuscript.transcend.aspect_lore.line7: §7§o— Inscribed on the inner walls of ancient circles —
manuscript.transcend.boss_lore.title: §4§l⟁ Manuscript of Wardens ⟁
manuscript.transcend.boss_lore.line1: §eElemental Warden §f— elemental shell left by the first ascendant after his death.
manuscript.transcend.boss_lore.line2: §fHe mastered fire, ice, thunder. His obsession was his end.
manuscript.transcend.boss_lore.line3: §5Void Weaver §f— a strange being from the void astray in this world.
manuscript.transcend.boss_lore.line4: §fBound to no aspect, yet wielding space and oblivion.
manuscript.transcend.boss_lore.line5: §fTranscendence Avatar §f— manifestation when mana density crosses the critical threshold.
manuscript.transcend.boss_lore.line6: §fIt is the ultimate trial of ascension, and ascension's price made flesh.
manuscript.transcend.ascension_lore.line: §fAscension is not sudden — it requires four stages of transformation.
§fAt each stage one swears a vow — trading part of self for supernal power.
§fStage 1: Awakening. Stage 2: Realization. Stage 3: Enlightenment. Stage 4: Ascension.
§fVows are immutable — once sworn, etched forever upon the soul.
§fThe mightier the vow, the heavier the price.
§fOnly those who bear all four vows may invoke the final art.
manuscript.transcend.aether_lore.title: §b§l⟁ Manuscript of Aether ⟁
manuscript.transcend.aether_lore.line1: §fThe Aether Realm — a place between truth and oblivion.
manuscript.transcend.aether_lore.line3: §fHolds §bAether Essence Ore §f— the realm's only pure mana source.
manuscript.transcend.aether_lore.line4: §fNo day, no night, no monsters — a safe sanctuary.
manuscript.transcend.aether_lore.line5: §fOnly Ascended of Stage 1+ may unlock the gate via the Traveler's Stone.
manuscript.transcend.aether_lore.line6: §fLegend speaks of an ultimate power here, capable of rewriting the world.
manuscript.transcend.aether_lore.line7: §7§o— The only surviving page of the Aether Chronicles —
